characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The main character, a little mouse girl that wants to be a ballerina. Debuts in the titular bookAngelina Ballerina. Be Careful What You Wish For: In "Angelina's Surprise", she's upset was that the Pinkpaws had a little brother. By the time "Angelina's Baby Sister" rolls around, she wishes that Matilda (her mother)didn'thave a baby and wants to take Polly back to the baby shop. Catchphrase: in the animated series: "I'm Angelina Ballerina, and (the plot)" and "Hoop-dee-doo!". Cool Big Sis: To Polly inAngelina's Halloween; she wants to be part of the group costume that Angelina and Alice are doing, but ends up as aBedsheet Ghostinstead because Angelina doesn't want her copying her. Dance Enthusiast: She loves ballet and dreams of becoming a prima ballerina. InThe Next Steps, she dabbles into other styles of dance such as tap dancing and the Irish jig.

characters.name: Introduced in the Books
characters.description: The main character, a little mouse girl that wants to be a ballerina. Debuts in the titular bookAngelina Ballerina. Be Careful What You Wish For: In "Angelina's Surprise", she's upset was that the Pinkpaws had a little brother. By the time "Angelina's Baby Sister" rolls around, she wishes that Matilda (her mother)didn'thave a baby and wants to take Polly back to the baby shop. Catchphrase: in the animated series: "I'm Angelina Ballerina, and (the plot)" and "Hoop-dee-doo!". Cool Big Sis: To Polly inAngelina's Halloween; she wants to be part of the group costume that Angelina and Alice are doing, but ends up as aBedsheet Ghostinstead because Angelina doesn't want her copying her. Dance Enthusiast: She loves ballet and dreams of becoming a prima ballerina. InThe Next Steps, she dabbles into other styles of dance such as tap dancing and the Irish jig.

characters.name: From the Animated Adaptations
characters.description: A friend of Angelina's, who has a crush on her. Extreme Doormat: William has a very passive, soft-spoken nature, and he's frequently shown to have trouble standing up for himself, which leads to him being easily influenced for the worst, or letting kids like Sammy walk all over him. The One Guy: He's one of the only boys in Angelina's ballet class, who deeply loves the sport, though sometimes he feels self-conscious about it. Real Men Wear Pink: He takes ballet along with the girls. Sensitive Guy and Manly Man: The Sensitive Guy to Sammy's Manly Man.
